items.body:
🔴 **Design Issue** — `AzureClouds` enum members use `UPPER_SNAKE_CASE`

```ts
export enum AzureClouds {
    AZURE_CHINA_CLOUD = "AZURE_CHINA_CLOUD",
    AZURE_PUBLIC_CLOUD = "AZURE_PUBLIC_CLOUD",
    AZURE_US_GOVERNMENT = "AZURE_US_GOVERNMENT"
}
```

Azure SDK for JavaScript enum members must use **PascalCase**, not `UPPER_SNAKE_CASE`. Compare with `KnownCreatedByType` in the same file (`Application`, `Key`, `ManagedIdentity`, `User`). The expected names would be:

```ts
export enum AzureClouds {
    AzureChinaCloud = "AZURE_CHINA_CLOUD",
    AzurePublicCloud = "AZURE_PUBLIC_CLOUD",
    AzureUsGovernment = "AZURE_US_GOVERNMENT"
}
```

**Fix:** Add `@clientName` directives in the TypeSpec spec to rename these members to PascalCase, then regenerate. File the issue in the [generation tool repository](https://github.com/Azure/autorest.typescript/issues) if this is emitted by the tooling.

🔴 **Tool Issue** — `autoPublish` changed from `true` to `false`

This package previously had `autoPublish: true`, and all sibling packages in the same service namespace (`arm-kubernetesconfiguration-extensions`, `arm-kubernetesconfiguration-fluxconfigurations`, `arm-kubernetesconfiguration-privatelinkscopes`, `arm-kubernetesconfiguration`) also use `autoPublish: true`.

Setting `autoPublish: false` will prevent this package from being automatically published as part of the SDK release pipeline.

**Fix:** Restore `"autoPublish": true` if this is a generation tooling regression. If the intent is to hold off publishing this beta package manually, please document the reason in the PR description.

**PR #37634 — `@azure/arm-kubernetesconfiguration-extensiontypes` 1.0.0-beta.2 review**

CI is passing. Two issues were found: (1) one **design issue** — the new `AzureClouds` enum exposes members in `UPPER_SNAKE_CASE` (`AZURE_CHINA_CLOUD`, `AZURE_PUBLIC_CLOUD`, `AZURE_US_GOVERNMENT`) which violates the Azure SDK for JS PascalCase enum convention; (2) one **tool issue** — `autoPublish` was silently changed from `true` to `false`, inconsistent with all sibling packages in the `kubernetesconfiguration` namespace and likely to block automated publishing.

<details>
<summary>📊 Structured Report</summary>

```json
{"agent":"mgmt-reviewer","pr":37634,"summary":"issues_found","findings":[{"file":"sdk/kubernetesconfiguration/arm-kubernetesconfiguration-extensiontypes/review/arm-kubernetesconfiguration-extensiontypes-node.api.md","line":13,"issueType":"design","category":"naming","description":"AzureClouds enum members use UPPER_SNAKE_CASE (AZURE_CHINA_CLOUD, AZURE_PUBLIC_CLOUD, AZURE_US_GOVERNMENT); should be PascalCase per Azure SDK TypeScript conventions."},{"file":"sdk/kubernetesconfiguration/arm-kubernetesconfiguration-extensiontypes/package.json","line":9,"issueType":"tool","category":"configuration","description":"autoPublish changed from true to false; all sibling packages use autoPublish:true and this will block automated publishing."}]}
```

</details>
